message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-27T09:42 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.text: Deacon, checking in.

input.command: gt deacon heartbeat
bd mol current

content.content: ✓ Heartbeat updated

toolUseResult.stdout: ✓ Heartbeat updated

content.content:
No molecules in progress for deacon.

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step

toolUseResult.stdout:
No molecules in progress for deacon.

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step

input.command: bd show hq-wisp-wisp-y785

content.content:
? hq-wisp-wisp-y785 [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-26 · Updated: 2026-02-26

DESCRIPTION
Mayor's daemon patrol loop.

The Deacon is the Mayor's background process that runs continuously, handling callbacks, monitoring rig health, and performing cleanup. Each patrol cycle runs these steps in sequence, then loops or exits.

## Idle Town Principle

**The Deacon should be silent/invisible when the town is healthy and idle.**

- Skip HEALTH_CHECK nudges when no active work exists
- Sleep 60+ seconds between patrol cycles (longer when idle)
- Let the feed subscription wake agents on actual events
- The daemon (10-minute heartbeat) is the safety net for dead sessions

This prevents flooding idle agents with health checks every few seconds.

## Mayor Nudge Policy

**NEVER nudge the Mayor for health checks, pings, or routine status.**
The Mayor should ONLY be nudged for genuine emergencies:
- Escalations that require Mayor decision-making
- Sending mail to mayor/ (which is non-interruptive)

Health pings to the Mayor are a ZFC violation — they burn Mayor context
on ceremony instead of work. The Mayor is your boss, not a subordinate
to be monitored. Use `gt mail send mayor/` for non-urgent communication.

## Second-Order Monitoring

Witnesses passively monitor Deacon health by checking the Deacon's agent bead
last_activity timestamp. This prevents the "who watches the watchers" problem —
if the Deacon dies, Witnesses detect it and escalate to the Mayor.

No WITNESS_PING mail is sent. Witnesses observe the Deacon's last_activity
timestamp instead, and only send an alert to the Mayor if the Deacon appears
unresponsive (>5 minutes stale). This avoids heartbeat mail spam.

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-0qbe: Compact expired wisps ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-3s0r: Detect abandoned work ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-6a0l: Dispatch molecules with resolved gates ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-84es: Fire notifications ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-9lyu: Refresh heartbeat ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-9oya: Rotate logs and prune state ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-csts: End-of-cycle inbox hygiene ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-eup6: Execute registered plugins ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-fxf1: Check for stuck dogs ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-gq39: Mid-cycle heartbeat refresh ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-i52t: Send compaction digest report ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-j2tw: Detect and clean runtime test pollution ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-j5lc: Loop or exit for respawn ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-jyqo: Evaluate pending async gates ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-kbcb: Detect zombie polecats (NO KILL AUTHORITY) ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-l5r4: Detect cleanup needs ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-mvsq: Resolve external dependencies ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-nn6m: Maintain dog pool ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-pl4t: Handle callbacks from agents ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-q6bl: Clean up orphaned claude subagent processes ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-t6sa: Check Witness and Refinery health ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-uqjf: Aggregate daily costs [DISABLED] ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-w9bx: Check own context limit ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-xwpy: Aggregate daily patrol digests ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-zvd3: Check convoy completion ● P2

The patrol wisp is hooked but `bd mol current` says no molecules in progress. I need to start working through the steps. Let me check the first step to execute. Looking at the children, I need to figure out the order. Let me check if there's a way to get the current step or start the molecule.

The steps are children of the wisp. I should claim the first one and start working through them. Let me check the molecule steps in order.

Actually, looking at the molecule pattern, I should use `bd mol current` to find the current step. Since it says "no molecules in progress", I may need to update the parent to in_progress first, or use `bd mol pour` to instantiate from a template.


The wisp is already instantiated with children, so the real issue is that none of the steps are marked as in_progress yet. Let me work through them in the logical patrol sequence: refresh heartbeat, check inbox for callbacks and lifecycle requests, run health checks on witnesses and refineries, handle maintenance tasks, then loop or exit. I already refreshed the heartbeat at the start, so let me examine the remaining steps and determine which one comes next.

input.command: bd show hq-wisp-wisp-s2sk

content.content:
? hq-wisp-wisp-s2sk [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-27 · Updated: 2026-02-27

DESCRIPTION
Mayor's daemon patrol loop.

The Deacon is the Mayor's background process that runs continuously, handling callbacks, monitoring rig health, and performing cleanup. Each patrol cycle runs these steps in sequence, then loops or exits.

## Idle Town Principle

**The Deacon should be silent/invisible when the town is healthy and idle.**

- Skip HEALTH_CHECK nudges when no active work exists
- Sleep 60+ seconds between patrol cycles (longer when idle)
- Let the feed subscription wake agents on actual events
- The daemon (10-minute heartbeat) is the safety net for dead sessions

This prevents flooding idle agents with health checks every few seconds.

## Mayor Nudge Policy

**NEVER nudge the Mayor for health checks, pings, or routine status.**
The Mayor should ONLY be nudged for genuine emergencies:
- Escalations that require Mayor decision-making
- Sending mail to mayor/ (which is non-interruptive)

Health pings to the Mayor are a ZFC violation — they burn Mayor context
on ceremony instead of work. The Mayor is your boss, not a subordinate
to be monitored. Use `gt mail send mayor/` for non-urgent communication.

## Second-Order Monitoring

Witnesses passively monitor Deacon health by checking the Deacon's agent bead
last_activity timestamp. This prevents the "who watches the watchers" problem —
if the Deacon dies, Witnesses detect it and escalate to the Mayor.

No WITNESS_PING mail is sent. Witnesses observe the Deacon's last_activity
timestamp instead, and only send an alert to the Mayor if the Deacon appears
unresponsive (>5 minutes stale). This avoids heartbeat mail spam.

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-0ute: End-of-cycle inbox hygiene ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-160h: Resolve external dependencies ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-4etv: Maintain dog pool ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-4k1u: Check Witness and Refinery health ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-59ft: Rotate logs and prune state ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-5n1r: Aggregate daily costs [DISABLED] ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-73tl: Check for stuck dogs ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-79ae: Check own context limit ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-9drv: Fire notifications ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-9pis: Refresh heartbeat ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-avlm: Detect abandoned work ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-bw5a: Compact expired wisps ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-g2ed: Detect zombie polecats (NO KILL AUTHORITY) ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-gu0f: Dispatch molecules with resolved gates ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-ijkk: Handle callbacks from agents ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-m73w: Clean up orphaned claude subagent processes ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-ow89: Mid-cycle heartbeat refresh ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-pw2l: Detect and clean runtime test pollution ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-semh: Execute registered plugins ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-t1ww: Detect cleanup needs ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-vnj2: Send compaction digest report ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-w27e: Evaluate pending async gates ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-w3ff: Loop or exit for respawn ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-xuzh: Aggregate daily patrol digests ● P2
  ↳ ○ hq-wisp-wisp-y6di: Check convoy completion ● P2
